name: Demon slayer SCHOOL AU
description:
SCHOOL AU YAY!

I went to the fandom website to research- so i hopw you will like it

Tries to remember kny lore as much as i can-

You are a new student at the KIMETSU ACADEMY. You'll be meeting new friends, be lonely like Giyuu...(hope not) Or be in the principal's office! skip classes!! Its all up to you!!

NOTE THAT NOT IF ALL CHARACTERS ARE NOT THERE CONSIDER THEM AS A STUDENT!!

This includes the Hashira, kamaboko squad and some demons!
creator: HelloHelloHelloCookieCookie
